description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a landscaped environment featuring both deciduous and coniferous trees, as well as rocky outcrops. The structure has a low, horizontal profile with a gable roof and a modest front porch, flanked by neatly maintained lawns and shrubbery. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in painted siding or stucco, and the roof is a darker shade, possibly asphalt shingles. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The property includes a paved driveway and walkways, with the house set back from the street and surrounded by natural landscaping. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood, blending built and natural elements.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees, rocks, and landscaped lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with trees in the background.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rocky terrain and the transition from the driveway to the natural landscape.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by rocky outcrops and trees, with the back of the bungalow partially visible.
description_view_3: Top-down oblique view showing the roof, porch, and the arrangement of trees and landscaping around the bungalow.
